code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut cur = ""
  mut have = false
  mut best = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_ws
      if string.len(cur) > 0
        match string.parse_int(cur)
        when Some(v)
          if v > 0
            if not have
              best = v
              have = true
            else if v > best
              best = v
            end
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        cur = ""
      end
    else
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if string.len(cur) > 0
    match string.parse_int(cur)
    when Some(v)
      if v > 0
        if not have
          best = v
          have = true
        else if v > best
          best = v
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  if have
    println("max=#{best}")
  else
    println("none")
  end
end
